# Appendix

## Repository Layout

```text
clinical-medical-data-systems/
├── data/
├── results/
├── reports/
├── scripts/
├── assets/
└── logs/
```

## Clinical Data Tables

The first version of this system uses privacy-safe synthetic clinical tables:

```text
patients.tsv
encounters.tsv
diagnoses.tsv
medications.tsv
labs.tsv
vitals.tsv
outcomes.tsv
```

## Notes on Executability

Quarto chapters are primarily instructional.

Runnable scripts should be stored in `scripts/`.
